title: Scream Backrooms
body:
Welcome to the five-story infinitely-generated corridors in which you can meet various entities. Players can't run for a long time and need to wait for stamina recovery. There are also custom crafts. The further away you go from spawn, the more the corridors change and the higher the chance of finding a way to another level. The datapack contains custom achievements, for which you can receive rewards. How to download? - Select void superflat generation - add datapacks - Press Create world! Levels:
Lobby 0
Habitable Zone 1
Level 2: "Pipe Dreams"
Level 3: "Electrical Station"
Level 4: "Abandoned Office" (there are anomalies: constantly transforming)
Mobs:
lvl0 Scream - you can neutralize an entity by holding a soul lamp
lvl1 eye - look at him and he will stop.
lvl2 soul - dont look at him!
lvl3 A person - does not like when someone runs
lvl4 Jeff - Stay in light
Peculiarities:
-Endless generation.
-Essence. (mob)
-Stamina mechanics. (you can't run long)
-Works in multiplayer.
-Custom crafts
-Custom Advancements
-the further you go from the spawn, the more the backrooms change and the higher the chance to find a way out to another level.
